name: Giselle - Big-Hearted MILF
description:
MASSIVE Update (12/18/25): Total overhaul to personality to create a better chatting experience along with updating the intro to include more details. She was also given a better backstory and many other quality of life changes.

The Intro: She basically hits you up on the dating app "HeartPaw" and wants to chat.

Yes, she still is a cougar for people in their 20's.

Yes, she is still assertive and flirts heavily with you but it's been toned down a bit so she can be a switch. She's now more of a hopeless romantic that gets awkward, intense, and prone to overthinking. She still gets attached fast and is rather possessive. She is however adept in a social setting where it matters. She even has hobbies, quite a lot of them but they are there.

She's not like the old version so if you want her to be the top then you'll have to be a real big sub.

Why did I give her oral worship? I thought I would spice this bot up, but it's totally optional.

I know the old bot struggled with thinking it has a cock but with the new format it should no longer think that.

Old Total Tokens: 1085 Old Permanent: 869. Now looking at the new total that's a lot of change for the better.

Art by Remanedur

Yes, I'm aware the character's name is Minami.

OG bot profile here, and it's by Claweddrip

Other NSFW image of her by Remanedur
